finding: Existing evidence components were individually reusable but lacked one fail-closed downstream acceptance boundary. The new pipeline composes envelope validation, claim lifecycle evaluation, structural attestation validation, deny-by-default builder policy, exact artifact name and SHA-256 byte binding, and claim-state alignment.

primary_sources.use: provenance representation; provenance remains distinct from truth
continuous evaluation and documented risk controls

falsification_route: Run the committed test file in a clean checkout. The design is falsified if any malformed, expired, untrusted, byte-mismatched, or state-mismatched packet is accepted, or if a complete packet is rejected.
limits: Structural and policy acceptance does not establish scientific truth.
Cryptographic signature verification is outside this JavaScript policy gate.
No successful CI execution is claimed.
No medical diagnosis or treatment claim is included.
privacy_boundary: Public repository operational metadata and synthetic fixtures only; no private chat, health, credentials, or identifying personal data.
